## Removed in 3.1.3 (2 total)
- `DELETE /dna/intent/api/v1/discovery/{startIndex}/{recordsToDelete}`
- `GET /dna/intent/api/v1/global-credential/{id}`

## Breaking-change scan
- Auth endpoint `/dna/system/api/v1/auth/token` present: 2.3.7.9=True  3.1.3=True
- 2.3.7.9 pagination param freq: {'limit': 264, 'offset': 263, 'starttime': 72, 'endtime': 73, 'startindex': 5, 'page': 1}
- 3.1.3   pagination param freq: {'limit': 287, 'offset': 284, 'starttime': 84, 'endtime': 85, 'startindex': 4, 'page': 1, 'cursor': 2}

- 2.3.7.9 response-shape sample (top 5): [(('response', 'version'), 2)]
- 3.1.3   response-shape sample (top 5): []

## Recommendation

**Default `active_version: "2.3.7.9"`** — matches the always-on DevNet sandbox (which runs marketing version 2.3.7.10, a patch release of 2.3.7.x). Smoke tests against `sandboxdnac.cisco.com` will see the closest possible spec.

Versions are highly aligned (87.8% operationId overlap, identical auth endpoint, same pagination conventions of offset/limit primary). 3.1.3 is a superset: 143 paths added (mostly Wireless feature templates, energy/data APIs, backup APIs, IoT MRP rings, LAN automation port channels), 2 paths removed (legacy `/discovery/{startIndex}/{recordsToDelete}` and `/global-credential/{id}` GET).

Notable new patterns in 3.1.3:
- **`cursor` pagination param** (2 endpoints) — extend the pagination detector if/when those endpoints matter.
- **`Backup`, `Restore`, `Industrial Configuration`, `Know Your Network`** — new top-level tags.

No breaking changes detected for auth or response envelope. Safe to ship 2.3.7.9 as the default; users on newer installs can swap by editing `catalyst_center_mcp.active_version` in `config.yaml`.
